doc.problem: Cold solder joint cluster on C12 capacitor (PM-00008, Kondensator 100µF X7R) on Motor Controller MC-200 (ART-00001). 26 in-factory SOLDER_COLD defects concentrated in weeks 5–6/2026 (2026-01-26 to 2026-02-11), all linked to ElektroParts GmbH supplier batch SB-00009 (B00009, received 2026-02-03). Symptoms: tombstoning, poor wetting, shifted components, solder bridging at C12 position. Severity predominantly high/critical. 12 field claims followed in March–April 2026 across DE, FR, US, IT markets reporting total unit failure after thermal cycling (8–12 weeks in field). Total impact: €4,243 defect cost + €1,648 rework cost + €10,820 field claim cost = ~€16,711.

failureImages.name: defect_01_cold_solder.jpg — representative cold-solder image from multiple defects (DEF-00002, DEF-00006, DEF-00015, DEF-00025)

inProduction.reference: 260 products received parts from SB-00009 batch. Exact in-production count requires WIP check — 260 is total installed.

atCustomer.reference: 12 field claims received (FC-00001 through FC-00012) from DE, FR, US, IT markets. Actual units at customer likely higher.

production_stop.description: Stop use of PM-00008 from batch SB-00009 (B00009, ElektroParts GmbH) on all production lines. Quarantine remaining stock. Switch to batch SB-00010 or SB-00008 after ESR verification.

internal_info.description: Notify all line supervisors (Montage Linie 1/2, all factories) that batch SB-00009 PM-00008 is quarantined. Post quality alert at SMT assembly stations.

sample_request.description: Request 20 pcs retention samples from SB-00009 for ESR testing, cross-section analysis, and wetting-balance test. Also request 20 pcs from SB-00008 (known-good batch) as control.

warehouse_sort.description: Sort all PM-00008 stock in warehouse by batch. Quarantine SB-00009 (B00009). Release SB-00008 and SB-00010 only after ESR verification passes.

derogation.description: No derogation recommended — defective batch must be fully replaced, not used-as-is.

sub_supplier_claim.description: Open formal 8D supplier claim against ElektroParts GmbH (SUP-01) for batch SB-00009 (B00009). Demand root-cause analysis of lead-finish deviation, corrective action plan, and credit for €16,711 total quality cost.

additional_controls.description: Implement 100% ESR screening on all incoming PM-00008 batches until supplier corrective action is verified. Add visual inspection of C12 solder joint at SMT exit.

other.description: Initiate field recall assessment for all MC-200 units built with SB-00009 parts. Prioritize units shipped to thermal-cycling environments. Coordinate RMA with affected customers.

occurrence.potentialCause: Incoming supplier batch SB-00009 (ElektroParts GmbH, Kondensator 100µF X7R, received 2026-02-03) has elevated ESR and poor lead finish causing insufficient solder wetting during reflow, leading to cold joints, tombstoning, and component shift at BOM position C12.
whys: Why did C12 caps have cold solder joints? — Because solder did not wet properly to the component leads during reflow.
Why did solder not wet properly? — Because the lead finish on batch SB-00009 capacitors had poor solderability (elevated ESR, oxidized or contaminated leads).
Why did batch SB-00009 have poor lead finish? — Because ElektroParts GmbH supplier QA did not catch the lead-finish deviation before shipment.
Why did supplier QA miss it? — Because incoming inspection criteria at ElektroParts do not include solderability/wetting-balance testing on every batch.
Why is there no solderability gate at supplier? — Because the supplier specification was not updated to require per-batch wetting-balance or ESR screening.

rootCauses.text: ElektroParts GmbH batch SB-00009 (PM-00008) shipped with defective lead finish causing poor solderability — supplier QA escape.
Manex incoming inspection did not include ESR / solderability check for PM-00008 capacitors — detection gap at goods receipt.

detection.potentialCause: Cold solder joints on C12 were only detected at end-of-line electrical test (Pruefung Linie 2, SEC-00005). No incoming inspection gate caught the defective batch, and no in-line visual/AOI check at SMT assembly flagged poor wetting before board integration.
whys: Why were defective units not caught earlier? — Because the only electrical test is at end-of-line (Pruefung), not at SMT sub-assembly level.
Why is there no SMT-level inspection? — Because AOI/X-ray is not deployed on the C12 solder joint in the current control plan.
Why isn't C12 in the AOI scope? — Because the control plan was written before this failure mode was known and capacitor solderability was assumed adequate.
Why was incoming inspection insufficient? — Because ESR / solderability testing was not part of the incoming QC protocol for PM-00008.
Why was no incoming QC for solderability? — Because the supplier was historically reliable and no risk assessment flagged the need.

rootCauses.text: No incoming ESR or solderability screening for PM-00008 at goods receipt allowed defective batch SB-00009 to enter production undetected.
No in-process AOI / visual gate at SMT assembly for C12 joint quality — defects only caught at end-of-line test.

plannedOccurrence.description: Require ElektroParts GmbH to implement per-batch wetting-balance and ESR testing with Cpk ≥ 1.33 on PM-00008 before shipment. Update supplier quality agreement.
Qualify alternative capacitor supplier as second source for PM-00008 (100µF X7R) to reduce single-source risk.
Add ESR and solderability (wetting-balance) test to incoming inspection protocol for PM-00008 at goods receipt. Reject batches outside spec.

plannedDetection.description: Deploy AOI (Automated Optical Inspection) at SMT exit to inspect C12 solder joint quality before board integration. Target: 100% coverage of BOM position C12.
Add in-circuit ESR test for C12 at Pruefung stations (SEC-00002, SEC-00005) with pass/fail limit to catch marginal joints that pass visual but fail electrically.

doc.appreciation: This 8D addresses the SOLDER_COLD defect cluster on Motor Controller MC-200 (ART-00001), root-caused to a defective incoming capacitor batch SB-00009 from ElektroParts GmbH. The investigation identified 26 in-factory defects and 12 field claims totaling ~€16.7k in quality costs. Root cause: supplier lead-finish defect causing poor solderability at C12 position. Key corrective actions include batch quarantine, incoming ESR screening, AOI deployment at SMT exit, supplier 8D claim, and second-source qualification. Report closure is pending implementation verification and effectiveness confirmation of all planned actions.

customer.contactPerson.note: Enter the primary customer contact who raised the complaint (field claims come from FR, DE, US, IT markets).

supplier.complaintNo.note: Issue a supplier complaint number to ElektroParts GmbH for batch SB-00009 (B00009).

supplier.contactPerson.note: Enter ElektroParts GmbH quality contact for supplier claim.

problem.source: DEF-00001 through DEF-00025, FC-00001 through FC-00012, SB-00009, OBS-S1-01, OBS-S1-02, OBS-S1-03

suspect.inWarehouse.note: Check warehouse for remaining uninstalled PM-00008 stock from batch SB-00009 (B00009). Quarantine immediately.

suspect.inTransit.note: Check logistics for any MC-200 units in transit containing SB-00009 parts.

immediate.customer_informed.note: Customer notification required for all markets (DE, FR, US, IT) with field-deployed MC-200 units containing SB-00009 parts. Draft communication and get approval.

implementedOccurrence.note: Record implementation status after planned occurrence actions are executed. Include effectiveness rating based on defect recurrence data.

implementedDetection.note: Record implementation status after planned detection actions are executed. Include effectiveness rating based on escape rate.

firstOkPo.note: Enter the first production order built with verified-good PM-00008 batch (SB-00008 or SB-00010 after ESR screening).

firstOkDate.note: Enter date of first defect-free production run after containment measures are in place.

riskOfNewFailure.note: Risk remains until incoming ESR screening is implemented and supplier corrective action is verified. Batch SB-00010 (received 2026-03-01) from same supplier has not been validated.

preventive.work_instruction.note: Update incoming inspection work instruction for PM-00008 to include ESR test and wetting-balance acceptance criteria.

preventive.spc.note: Establish SPC chart for ESR values on incoming PM-00008 batches. Set control limits based on SB-00008 (known-good) baseline.

preventive.control_plan.note: Add C12 solder joint inspection (AOI or visual) to control plan at SMT exit. Add incoming ESR gate for PM-00008.

preventive.fmea.note: Update process FMEA for MC-200 assembly: add failure mode 'cold-solder-joint on C12 due to supplier lead-finish defect'. Severity=9, Occurrence=4 (batch-dependent), Detection=5 (after AOI added). RPN target < 100.

preventive.preventive_maintenance.note: Root cause is supplier material, not equipment \u2014 PM not applicable.

preventive.other.note: Conduct supplier audit at ElektroParts GmbH focused on lead-finish process, incoming material controls, and outgoing QA. Require PPAP resubmission for PM-00008.

transferredToSimilar.note: Lessons learned should be applied to all ElektroParts GmbH supplied capacitor types and to any other single-source SMT components.

otherPartsAffected.note: Other capacitor variants from ElektroParts GmbH should be assessed for the same lead-finish risk.

otherPartsWhich.note: List all other part numbers supplied by ElektroParts GmbH (SUP-01). Check if any other capacitor/passive component from this supplier is used in MC-200 or other articles.

champion.note: Assign the 8D champion (typically Quality Manager or Plant Manager). No manager names available in Manex.

coordinator.note: Assign the 8D coordinator (typically the quality engineer leading this investigation).

team.note: user_042, user_071, user_023 performed most rework on this defect cluster. Named roles (Incoming QC, SQA, SMT Process) need real names assigned.

appreciation.source: OBS-S1-01, OBS-S1-02, OBS-S1-03, SB-00009, DEF-00001 through DEF-00025, FC-00001 through FC-00012
